V112_only.note: structurally derived baseline; residual factor is the universal mu9 algebra-to-geometry projection (intrinsic precision ~4, same coefficient as eta_B)

V112_plus_58.note: redundant alternative geometric reading of the mu9 residual, not independent support; the A2-Coxeter identification of the 58 is itself Stratum 1

full_E8_sampling.note: redundant alternative reading of the mu9 residual

residual_factor.mechanism: integer-rounding of the continuous horizon count N: unrounded N=72.75 gives (7/15)*phi^-582 = 1.09e-122, matching observation; equivalently exactly one single-phi inflation step (a quarter of a phi^4 rung)
residual_factor.status: quarter-step itself open (a why-now phase, not yet derived)
residual_factor.coarse_bound: also within the mu9 projection precision ~4, but phi^2 is the sharp account

cosmological_constant_Lambda_MP2.form: Lambda = c_W * phi^(-8 N), N = 73 Fibonacci-substitution iterations from ell* to the cosmic horizon; phi^(-8N) = 8.94e-123

ratio_prediction.note: eta_B/J_CKM = p_c * mu9_cosmo; matches observed with current Jarlskog

Omega_DM_over_Omega_B.framework: typical ~2-5% outcome of the cluster-merger random walk (heavy-tailed), = V(tau=-1)/V(tau=+1)
